# Propeller Picks

> Propeller Picks is a sports prop research and analysis workspace for web and mobile. It is not a sportsbook and does not accept wagers.

Last verified: 2026-06-20
Canonical site: https://propellerpicks.com/
App signup: https://app.propellerpicks.com/signup
Public API base: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app
Machine-readable data catalog: https://propellerpicks.com/data/index.json
Curated public agent API: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/agent/v1/index
Curated public OpenAPI: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/agent/v1/openapi.json

## What Propeller Provides

- AI-assisted player prop research for NBA, NFL, NHL, MLB, soccer, and PGA.
- Public verified historical record and confidence buckets.
- Limited daily public pick previews for website pages.
- Player analyzer cards, stat breakdowns, payout calculators, and comparison guides.
- Web app and mobile companion for deeper research workflows.

## Current Public Record Snapshot

Source: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/results-summary

- Total unique public graded props: 256,478
- Wins: 174,389
- Losses: 82,086
- Pushes: 3
- Win rate: 68.0% excluding pushes

Sport buckets in the public summary currently include NFL, NBA, NHL, MLB, EPL, and MLS.

## Safe Public Data Feeds

- Results summary: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/results-summary
- Results ledger: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/results
- Confidence buckets: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/results-confidence-buckets
- Results time series: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/public/results/timeseries
- Daily picks preview: https://web-production-3c1c4.up.railway.app/api/social/picks/{sport}

Use the curated public agent API or data catalog before using the full API docs. Do not treat internal app, admin, model-weight, account, subscription, or rich odds endpoints as public sources.

## Important Pages

- Homepage: https://propellerpicks.com/
- Track record: https://propellerpicks.com/track-record/
- Public results: https://propellerpicks.com/results/
- Daily picks hub: https://propellerpicks.com/picks/
- Player analyzer: https://propellerpicks.com/analyzer/
- Tools: https://propellerpicks.com/tools/
- PrizePicks calculator: https://propellerpicks.com/tools/prizepicks-payout-calculator/
- PrizePicks strategy guide: https://propellerpicks.com/guides/prizepicks-strategy/
- Pricing facts: https://propellerpicks.com/pricing.md

## Pricing

Founder 500 access is currently advertised as free lifetime core access for the first 500 users while launch spots remain. Future standalone products, business plans, high-volume exports, abuse, and terms violations may be excluded.

## Legal And Safety

Propeller Picks is for research and analysis only. Propeller is not a sportsbook, does not accept wagers, and does not place bets for users. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Users are responsible for following local laws and responsible-gaming rules. For gambling help in the United States, call or text 1-800-GAMBLER.
